title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
summary: Build production-grade web applications across the stack — React on the front, Node/Python on the back, deployed on modern cloud infrastructure.
responsibilities: Design and ship features end-to-end across the stack
Collaborate with product and design on technical architecture
Write clean, well-tested, maintainable code
Mentor junior engineers and review pull requests
Participate in on-call rotation for critical systems
requirements: 5+ years of professional software development experience
Strong proficiency with JavaScript/TypeScript, React, and Node.js
Experience with relational and document databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB)
Hands-on experience with AWS, Azure, or GCP
Excellent written and verbal communication

title: AI / Machine Learning Engineer
summary: Design, build, and ship LLM-powered applications, RAG systems, and autonomous agents that solve real business problems.
responsibilities: Build and deploy LLM applications, RAG pipelines, and agent systems
Design evaluation harnesses and observability for AI systems
Fine-tune models and optimize for cost, latency, and accuracy
Partner with clients to translate business needs into AI architecture
Stay current with rapidly evolving AI tooling and best practices
requirements: 3+ years building production ML / AI systems
Hands-on with OpenAI, Anthropic, or open-weight model APIs
Strong Python skills; experience with PyTorch or TensorFlow a plus
Familiarity with vector databases and retrieval techniques
Comfort with ambiguity — research-into-production mindset

title: DevOps / Cloud Engineer
summary: Own the cloud infrastructure, CI/CD, and observability systems that power our software delivery for clients.
responsibilities: Design and maintain scalable cloud infrastructure on AWS / Azure / GCP
Build CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure-as-code (Terraform, Pulumi)
Set up monitoring, logging, and alerting for production systems
Optimize cost, performance, and security across deployments
Document, automate, and improve developer experience
requirements: 4+ years in DevOps, SRE, or platform engineering roles
Deep expertise in at least one major cloud provider
Kubernetes, Docker, and modern IaC tools
Scripting fluency in Python, Bash, or Go
Strong incident-response and troubleshooting skills

title: Senior Product Designer
summary: Lead product design across multiple client engagements — from research and IA to high-fidelity UI and design systems.
responsibilities: Drive design from research and discovery through to handoff
Build and maintain design systems for client products
Collaborate closely with engineers throughout implementation
Run user research and usability testing
Mentor designers and elevate the team's craft
requirements: 5+ years designing complex SaaS or enterprise software
A portfolio that shows clarity of thought and craft
Mastery of Figma; comfort with prototyping tools
Strong communication and stakeholder-management skills
Familiarity with AI-product design patterns a strong plus

title: Technology Consultant
summary: Embed with enterprise clients to lead AI and digital-transformation engagements — from strategy through delivery.
responsibilities: Run discovery sprints and AI-readiness assessments
Advise client leadership on technology strategy and roadmaps
Lead cross-functional delivery teams on engagements
Translate business goals into technical execution plans
Develop case studies and contribute to thought leadership
requirements: 6+ years in tech consulting, product strategy, or engineering leadership
Track record running successful enterprise software engagements
Strong written and presentation skills with executive audiences
Working understanding of AI / cloud / data architectures
Willingness to travel up to 25%

title: Frontend Engineer
summary: Build polished, performant user interfaces in React and Next.js — with a deep care for design fidelity and user experience.
responsibilities: Implement UI features in React, Next.js, and TypeScript
Partner with designers to ship pixel-accurate, accessible interfaces
Optimize performance, bundle size, and Core Web Vitals
Write tests and contribute to component libraries
Pair with backend engineers on API contracts
requirements: 3+ years of frontend engineering experience
Strong skills in React, TypeScript, and modern CSS
Eye for design and attention to detail
Familiarity with state management, testing, and accessibility
Bonus: animation libraries (Framer Motion, GSAP)
